mapper.sql: id, feishu_project_id, feishu_project_name, project_id, defect_count, expected_write_duration, last_sync_time, sync_status, sync_error_msg, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into feishu_project_info (id, feishu_project_id, feishu_project_name, project_id, defect_count, expected_write_duration, last_sync_time, sync_status, sync_error_msg, create_time, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{feishuProjectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{feishuProjectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{defectCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{expectedWriteDuration,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{lastSyncTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{syncStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{syncErrorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update feishu_project_info set feishu_project_id = #{feishuProjectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, feishu_project_name = #{feishuProjectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_id = #{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, defect_count = #{defectCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, expected_write_duration = #{expectedWriteDuration,jdbcType=BIGINT}, last_sync_time = #{lastSyncTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sync_status = #{syncStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sync_error_msg = #{syncErrorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
